sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this title

special_mechanics.name: Crane Kick
special_mechanics.description: Special move activated by collecting 'C' symbols. Used as primary attack against enemies.

special_mechanics.name: Drum Punch
special_mechanics.description: Special move activated by collecting 'D' symbols. Alternative attack move.

special_mechanics.name: Wind Interference
special_mechanics.description: Level 3 mechanic where typhoon wind interferes with player's jumps and trajectory control.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative only. Source material (Wikipedia) contains only gameplay descriptions and level layout information. No technical physics parameters, ROM values, or movement mechanics data documented. Beat-em-up focused on combat rather than movement mechanics. Jump mechanics mentioned in Level 3 ('tricky jumps') but not quantified.
